title: ensure + old (postcondition)
manager: `ensure` — a postcondition contract that must hold after a transition, with `old` to reference the pre-transition state so you can say "the balance decreased by exactly the amount withdrawn." Postconditions are how a machine states what a transition guarantees, and `old` is what makes those guarantees relational rather than merely point-in-time snapshots. The second pillar of design-by-contract.
cs: `ensure <expr>` postcondition with `old(slot)` (§10); needs the assign/journal pre-state (W6.60); violation per W6.65.
